name: HILOTEX INTERNATIONAL PRIVATE LIMITED
description: The company specializes in sourcing and procuring knitting and weaving yarns, including high-quality cotton yarn from top manufacturers in India, ensuring durability and contemporary products. With over 30 years of experience, it connects clients with reliable suppliers in the textiles industry.

name: SVP Global Textiles Limited
description: The company is a leading manufacturer of compact cotton yarn, boasting a legacy of over 100 years and modern manufacturing facilities in Oman and India. With a substantial production capacity, they offer a diverse range of high-quality cotton yarns, positioning themselves as one of the largest producers in the global market.

name: YUNUS TEXTILE MILLS LIMITED
description: Yunus Textile Mills Limited is a global leader in the design, marketing, and distribution of premium textile products, highlighting its expertise in the textile industry.

name: Cotton Field (BD) Ltd.
description: Cotton Field (BD) Ltd is a manufacturer in the ready-made garments industry, producing a diverse range of apparel. Their operations suggest a strong capacity for textile production, which may include cotton yarn as a fundamental material in their garments.

name: Cotyarn Tradelink LLP
description: Cotyarn Tradelink LLP is a specialized brokerage and commission agency in the cotton industry, focusing on providing premium quality cotton yarns. With a commitment to superior quality and a strong presence in global cotton markets, they aim to meet the unique needs of their clients.

name: Cotton & Company LLP
description: Cotton is a CPA firm that specializes in providing services for governmental agencies and commercial clients, ensuring accountability and proper handling of funds and data.

name: U.S. Cotton
description: The company, U.S. Cotton, is dedicated to manufacturing and marketing high-quality cotton products that meet consumer needs, emphasizing principles like quality and performance. Their commitment to innovative solutions and state-of-the-art technology ensures they provide top-tier cotton items, which positions them as a leader in the health and beauty cotton products market.

name: United Raw Material Pte Ltd
description: URMPL is a significant supplier and exporter of cotton yarn, among other textile yarns made from various natural and synthetic fibers. The company's commitment to providing high-quality products at competitive prices ensures customer satisfaction and strengthens its presence in the global market.

name: Art-Yarn Exports (India) Pvt. Ltd.
description: Art-yarn is committed to providing high-quality cotton yarn, emphasizing their dedication to sustainability and innovation in the yarn industry. With multiple certifications, including GOTS and Oeko-Tex, they ensure that their cotton products meet rigorous standards for organic and recycled materials.

name: Sutlej Textiles and Industries
description: Sutlej Textiles and Industries Limited is a prominent textile solutions provider that offers a diverse range of products, including cotton yarn. With a strong manufacturing capacity and a commitment to innovation and quality, the company processes an extensive portfolio of cotton blended and dyed yarns, making it a key player in the cotton yarn market.
